narrative:
Sandusky Twp township has 2,558 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
